LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CARLOS ORTEGA, FERNANDO MUSALEM MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT IS GRANTED. (CCP 473(B).) DEFENDANTS HAVE DEMONSTRATED MISTAKE, INADVERTENCE, SURPRISE AND/OR EXCUSABLE NEGLECT IN THEIR FAILURE TO TIMELY RESPOND TO THE COMPLAINT. WITHIN 10 DAYS, DEFENDANTS SHALL FILE A RESPONSIVE PLEADING TO THE COMPLAINT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS CARLOS ORTEGA AND FERNANDO MUSALEM'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS CONTINUED TO JULY 30, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE THE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JULY 16, 2013, AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

Off Calendar Jul-29-2013 Continued To Sep-25-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jul-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CARLOS ORTEGA, FERNANDO MUSALEM MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT IS Granted. (CCP 473(b).) Defendants have demonstrated mistake, inadvertence, surprise and/or excusable neglect in their failure to timely respond to the Complaint. Within 10 days, Defendants shall file a responsive pleading to the Complaint. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jul-16-2013 Continued To Jul-30-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs CARLOS ORTEGA and FERNANDO MUSALEM's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS Continued to July 30, 2013, to give the opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 16, 2013, at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. The Court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Continued To Aug-14-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
